title: Reinstatement Form
description: Reinstate a lapsed individual policy — updating, redating, or premium resumption.

questions.q: What type of reinstatement are you requesting?
Which requirements are you submitting with this form?
questions.help: Tick everything that applies. If reinstating under a monthly mode of payment, one of the last two is strictly required.

options.label: Duly dated and signed Reinstatement Form
Twelve (12) post-dated checks (PDC), PDC certification and PDC Monthly Agreement form
Proof of enrolment to auto-payment facility (Auto Charge, Auto Debit, PDC)

questions.q: Do you consent to updating Pru Life UK’s records based on the Life Insured and Policyowner details provided in this form?
questions.label: Yes, I consent

questions.q: What is the policy number to reinstate?
A second policy number, if this request covers another policy? (Skip if not.)
A third policy number? (Skip if not.)
What is the Life Insured's surname?
What is the Life Insured's given name?
What is the Life Insured's middle name?
Does the Life Insured's have any other legal name or alias? If so, type it; otherwise skip.
Name suffix (e.g. Jr., III)? Skip if none.
Preferred salutation (e.g. Mr., Mrs., Miss)?
What is the Life Insured's date of birth?
What is the Life Insured's nationality?
What is the Life Insured's mobile number?
What is the Life Insured's email address?
What is the Life Insured's present address?
Which country is that address in?
What is the ZIP code?
What is the Life Insured's occupation?
questions.help: State exact duties; if a member of AFP/PNP, state rank.

Is the Policyowner the same person as the Life Insured?

questions.q: What is the Policyowner's gross annual income (in PhP)?
Are you personally paying for this policy?

options.label: Yes — I, the Policyowner, am paying for this policy
No — a third-party payor will be paying (please also accomplish the KYC for third-party payor form)

questions.q: What is the reinstatement cost (amount you are paying)?
How will you pay?

sections.title: Statement of Insurability
sections.intro: This section should be completed by the Life Insured. The Policyowner portion should be completed if the Policy/ies has/have an existing payor waiver/payor term rider.

questions.q: Does the Policyowner also need to answer the health questions? (Only if the policy has an existing payor waiver or payor term rider.)
Life Insured — Is the Life Insured in good health, free from all diseases, deformities and abnormalities?
Policyowner — Is the Policyowner in good health, free from all diseases, deformities and abnormalities?
Please give the details for that "No" answer.
Life Insured — Since the issuance of the Policy/ies or the last reinstatement, has the Life Insured ever had any illness or recurrent illness, injury, medication, or disease?
Policyowner — Since the issuance of the Policy/ies or the last reinstatement, has the Policyowner ever had any illness or recurrent illness, injury, medication, or disease?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.

Life Insured — Ever had any medical consultation, hospitalization, or surgical operation due to any condition, or been prescribed for or attended by a physician or practitioner for any cause, or undergone any diagnostic test/s?

Policyowner — Ever had any medical consultation, hospitalization, or surgical operation due to any condition, or been prescribed for or attended by a physician or practitioner for any cause, or undergone any diagnostic test/s?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.
Life Insured — Ever been confined or hospitalized in a clinic, institution, or other medical facility?
Policyowner — Ever been confined or hospitalized in a clinic, institution, or other medical facility?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.
Life Insured — Ever changed the customary occupation, or country of residence?
Policyowner — Ever changed the customary occupation, or country of residence?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.
Life Insured — Ever had any application for life, accident or health insurance, or reinstatement that was declined, postponed, rated, or modified?
Policyowner — Ever had any application for life, accident or health insurance, or reinstatement that was declined, postponed, rated, or modified?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.
Life Insured — Experienced death among the immediate members of the family?
Policyowner — Experienced death among the immediate members of the family?
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.
Life Insured — For female clients: is she now pregnant? If yes, note how many months in the details.
Policyowner — For female clients: is she now pregnant? If yes, note how many months in the details.
Please give the details for that "Yes" answer.

sections.title: Declaration & Signatures
sections.intro: By signing, you declare and agree to the statements printed in the "Please read carefully before signing" section of the form, and acknowledge the Purpose Statement on data privacy.

questions.q: Where are you completing this form? (city/municipality)
What is today’s date?
Life Insured — please draw your customary signature.
questions.help: This certifies that the signature appearing on all your forms and valid IDs is your customary signature.

questions.q: Policyowner — please draw your customary signature (if other than the Life Insured).
